## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 6, 2026 - Jun 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Evgeny Salmer_, Jun 20, 2026, 1/5: "I used the app for years, but for the last ~3-6 months there is a significant quality drop: regular bugs or not working functionality at all. Also see a regular mismatch on calculations, broken overview tabs when you switch between months/categories. Assume we can say "thanks" to AI-optimizations and ViBeCoDiNg. Also getting premium ads on every start is annoying. Unfortunately not ready anymore neither to use it nor to pay for the permanently-broken app. Switched to a better free alternative."
            2. _XZ_, May 6, 2026, 1/5: "The app is so slow and sluggish that it is frustrating to use"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      5 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 12, 2026 - Jun 22, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Yousha Tahir_, Jun 22, 2026, 1/5: "there is no option to stop annoying pop up on the screen to upgrade to premium? evey single time i open it comes in the way"
            2. _Evgeny Salmer_, Jun 20, 2026, 1/5: "I used the app for years, but for the last ~3-6 months there is a significant quality drop: regular bugs or not working functionality at all. Also see a regular mismatch on calculations, broken overview tabs when you switch between months/categories. Assume we can say "thanks" to AI-optimizations and ViBeCoDiNg. Also getting premium ads on every start is annoying. Unfortunately not ready anymore neither to use it nor to pay for the permanently-broken app. Switched to a better free alternative."
            3. _Trina Heide_, Jun 6, 2026, 1/5: "This app was supposed to have a 7 day free trial but it charged my card immediately. I have cancelled the subscription and requested a refund. It also is trying to charge me a second time after I connected with my bank account. Then it keeps saying 3 times to connect to my account and I already did. It's not that good of an app"
